channel.title: Iliass Tahiri — Geomechanics & Materials
channel.description: Research notes, engineering insights, and practical guides on geomechanics, concrete durability, and AI tools for engineers.

item.title: Freeze-Thaw Durability of Pervious Concrete: Lessons from My PhD
item.description: Key lessons from my PhD on salt-frost damage in pervious concrete and how to design for better freeze-thaw durability.

item.title: New Paper: Oedometric-like setup for water transport
item.description: A paper I contributed to published in Review of Scientific Instruments.

item.title: New Paper: Salt-frost damage of pervious concrete
item.description: My paper on numerical investigation of salt-frost damage was published in Cement & Concrete Research.

item.title: Porous concrete, a state of the art
item.description: Improving the mix design of pervious concrete to resist freeze-thaw cycles.
